data.body:
I don’t believe that narrative has to stay locked in at a categorical level. If there isn’t a level of omniscient it lacks depth and if you never drop into any minds it can feel impersonal.
Constant present tense can be a trap, all urgency, no modulation.
Trusting your instincts is hard.
